description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, modern design with a combination of dark metallic and wooden elements. The barrel is elongated and supported by a prominent upper rail, which may serve as a mounting point for optics or other accessories. The stock is crafted from dark wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling, and transitions into a robust metallic receiver with intricate mechanical details. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The fore-end and receiver display a mix of matte black and brass-like finishes, giving the weapon a sophisticated, high-tech appearance. The muzzle is reinforced, and the overall build suggests durability and precision engineering.
description: A modern, dark metallic and wood shotgun with an elongated barrel, upper rail, and contoured wooden stock, featuring intricate mechanical details and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic receiver, and upper rail.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle, barrel alignment, and the symmetry of the upper rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the contoured wooden stock and the detailed receiver with visible mechanical components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip and stock, showing the narrow profile and alignment of the barrel and rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with an upper rail; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
